SEARCH
Package org.key_project.isabelletranslation.automation

Interface IsabelleSolver

All Superinterfaces:
Callable<IsabelleResult>
All Known Implementing Classes:
IsabelleSledgehammerSolver
public interface IsabelleSolver extends Callable<IsabelleResult>
An Isabelle solver. May use different methods to arrive at the result. Implements callable. Thread management must be handled by callers.

    state of the solver

      Getter for start time of the solver
      Returns:
      Time solver started computing (after preparation)

      Duration getComputationTime()
      Getter for computation time
      Returns:
      computation time before solver stopped

    • getTimeout

      int getTimeout()
      Returns the timeout time for solver in seconds
      Returns:
      timeout time for solver

    • setTimeout

      void setTimeout(int timeout)
      Sets the timeout value for this solver (in seconds)
      Parameters:
      timeout - timeout in seconds (negative values may cause unexpected behavior)

      Returns:
      current solver state

      Raw string of translation theory (not preamble)
      Returns:
      raw input of solver

    • getFinalResult

      IsabelleResult getFinalResult()
      The final result of solver. Recommended to be null, prior to solver completion.
      Returns:
      final result of solver
